description: Baseline before cloud dictation implementation

asi.hypothesis: Establish current static acceptance coverage and typecheck baseline before making implementation changes.
asi.baseline_dirty_worktree: Pre-existing uncommitted user changes were present before autoresearch setup; avoid overwriting them.

description: Add shared ASR/domain model and cloud-aware settings fields

asi.hypothesis: A provider-neutral Dictation Mode/ASR type layer plus persisted cloud consent/profile flags creates real implementation foundation without touching runtime behavior.
asi.learned: Typecheck passes with new shared asr.ts, default local.balanced mode, profile inherit/forbidCloudDictation, consent and cloud OCR opt-in flags, and history metadata fields.
asi.privacy_boundary: No API key storage or network calls added yet; settings store only contains consent and cloud OCR preference, not secrets.

description: Add cloud Prompt Pack builder and encrypted OpenAI credential store

asi.hypothesis: Prompt Pack caps and OS-encrypted BYOK storage are low-risk prerequisites that increase functional coverage while preserving privacy constraints.
asi.learned: Cloud Prompt Pack builder caps selected context at 50 terms and 1000 chars and only includes OCR terms when explicitly requested. Credential store uses Electron safeStorage or OPENAI_API_KEY dev override; no plain settings secret.
asi.next_candidate: Wire provider gating into transcription orchestration: resolve mode/profile, block cloud without consent/key, and keep local path default.

description: Resolve selected dictation mode and block cloud path before local transcription

asi.hypothesis: Wiring mode/profile resolution into TranscriptionService should preserve local behavior while blocking cloud until consent/key/provider implementation exists.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed, but current primary metric was saturated and did not capture this real gating step.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric was unchanged, so autoresearch rules require discard despite useful code.
asi.next_action_hint: First update autoresearch.sh with non-cheating acceptance probes for cloud gating (offline/profile/consent/key block behavior), then re-apply the mode resolution/gating change.

description: Measure and implement cloud gating in transcription orchestration

asi.hypothesis: Adding explicit acceptance probes for PRD-required cloud blocking lets the loop keep real mode-resolution work that was previously invisible to the metric.
asi.learned: TranscriptionService now resolves global/profile Dictation Mode, records local provider/mode metadata, maps beginner local modes to model IDs, and blocks cloud modes with distinct offline/profile/consent/API-key messages before any recording upload path exists.
asi.metric_note: autoresearch.sh expanded with non-cheating probes for concrete cloud gating behavior required by the PRD.

description: Expose encrypted OpenAI credential management through IPC/preload

asi.hypothesis: Credential IPC is a necessary setup surface foundation and can be added without exposing the secret to settings JSON or logs.
asi.learned: Main process now exposes status/set/clear handlers backed by safeStorage credential store; renderer receives only hasApiKey status except when intentionally passing a key to set it.
asi.security_note: No API key is returned over IPC and no plain settings persistence was introduced.

description: Add OpenAI file ASR provider for non-realtime cloud modes

asi.hypothesis: A focused OpenAI FileAsrProvider can implement the shared interface for accuracy/economy modes while keeping prompt/audio submission explicit and error details metadata-only.
asi.learned: Provider builds multipart requests to /v1/audio/transcriptions with WAV audio, selected mode model ID, optional language hint, and capped Prompt Pack text. It does not log or return API keys/provider bodies.
asi.gap: Provider is not yet wired into TranscriptionService; cloud modes are still blocked before use.

description: Wire OpenAI file provider into TranscriptionService cloud path

asi.hypothesis: Cloud accuracy/economy modes can be enabled by routing cloud file modes through OpenAiFileAsrProvider after consent/offline/profile/API-key gates, then applying explicit dictionary corrections and history metadata.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed but current primary metric did not measure provider wiring, so the real implementation step produced no primary improvement.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged; autoresearch rule requires discard.
asi.next_action_hint: Add acceptance probes for transcribeCloudFile, OpenAiFileAsrProvider usage, buildCloudPromptPack usage, hasApiKey gating, and disabled realtime error; then re-apply wiring.

description: Measure and wire OpenAI file provider into cloud transcription path

asi.hypothesis: With wiring probes added, cloud file modes can be routed through OpenAiFileAsrProvider while preserving all required pre-upload gates.
asi.learned: Cloud file transcription now checks offline/profile/consent/API-key, rejects realtime mode as unavailable, builds capped Prompt Pack with OCR only when enabled, sends to OpenAI file provider, applies explicit dictionary corrections, saves non-realtime audio/history metadata, and returns prompt preview text.
asi.privacy_boundary: Heuristic OCR-term post-corrections are not applied on cloud output; Prompt Pack is capped and opt-in for OCR context.

description: Add realtime Transcript Turn accumulator

asi.hypothesis: Realtime support needs a provider-neutral turn accumulator before the WebSocket provider, especially to preserve sequence order and bounded partial fallback semantics.
asi.learned: Added TranscriptTurnAccumulator that tracks provider item IDs, provisional/final/fallback status, first-seen sequence ordering, and final text composition with newline preservation for structural turns.
asi.gap: Not yet integrated with overlay Live Preview or OpenAI realtime WebSocket events.

description: Add OpenAI realtime ASR provider skeleton

asi.hypothesis: A minimal realtime provider skeleton can establish WebSocket session setup, provider-aware audio configuration, server VAD, prompt instructions, and preview event accumulation before native streaming is wired.
asi.learned: OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider opens gpt-realtime-whisper WebSocket with a 5s connection timeout, sends pcm16/server_vad session config, routes transcript deltas/completions into TranscriptTurnAccumulator, and avoids logging raw provider responses.
asi.risk: WebSocket auth subprotocol shape may need validation against OpenAI's current realtime API before release; no audio streaming method is wired yet.

description: Add overlay state support for realtime Live Preview

asi.hypothesis: Live Preview needs provider-neutral overlay state and rendering before realtime events can be surfaced from main to renderer.
asi.learned: RecordingOverlayState now supports finalizing mode, cloud provider label, and rolling livePreviewTurns; renderer displays final/provisional turns with distinct styling and keeps preview available during transcribing/finalizing states.
asi.gap: Main process does not yet feed OpenAI realtime preview turns into overlay state.

description: Block unready cloud dictation before recording starts

asi.hypothesis: Cloud modes should fail before microphone recording if offline/profile/consent/API key prerequisites are not satisfied.
asi.learned: Added shared CloudDictationReadiness, main IPC readiness check, preload API, and renderer startRecording gate. Local modes still require downloaded local model; cloud readiness bypasses local model requirement only when cloud is ready.
asi.privacy_boundary: No cloud audio can be recorded/uploaded from the renderer path when consent/API-key/offline/profile gates fail.

description: Add release settings controls for cloud setup

asi.hypothesis: Minimal setup UI for mode selection, consent, OCR-to-cloud opt-in, and API key storage lets users intentionally configure Cloud Dictation while preserving local-first defaults.
asi.learned: Settings tab now exposes Dictation Mode, explicit Cloud Dictation consent copy, OCR Context cloud opt-in default-off, and OpenAI API key save/clear controls that only show stored/not-stored status.
asi.ux_risk: API key entry currently uses window.prompt as a simple setup surface; should be replaced with a proper masked form before polish/release.

description: Add app profile dictation mode override and cloud-forbid UI

asi.hypothesis: Per-app profile controls are required to make Cloud Dictation safe for sensitive targets while allowing global cloud defaults elsewhere.
asi.learned: Profile modal now supports Dictation Mode inherit/override and a Forbid Cloud Dictation toggle; updateAppProfile preserves the new fields through the existing IPC path.
asi.privacy_boundary: Profile forbid flag is used by readiness/transcription gates to block cloud before recording/upload in sensitive apps.

description: Add OpenAI test connection action

asi.hypothesis: BYOK setup needs a safe test connection action that validates key/model access without sending audio or Prompt Pack context.
asi.learned: OpenAI provider can test model availability via metadata-only /v1/models/{model}; main/preload/UI expose Test connection next to API key controls. Result message is user-visible and no key is returned.
asi.next_action_hint: Refactor mode-to-model mapping in test-connection handler to reuse getDictationMode instead of nested ternary for maintainability.

description: Refactor OpenAI test connection model lookup

asi.hypothesis: Use shared getDictationMode metadata instead of nested ternary when choosing the model to test.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed and refactor was cleaner, but primary metric unchanged.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged; autoresearch rules require discard.
asi.next_action_hint: Only reapply if bundled with a measurable user-facing improvement, e.g. unavailable-mode disabled reason or status badge.

description: Show provider/mode metadata in transcript history

asi.hypothesis: History should make cloud/local provenance visible by surfacing provider, Dictation Mode, model, and realtime turn metadata.
asi.learned: History rows now label Cloud Dictation vs Local dictation and show dictationModeId, raw model ID, duration, turn count/status when present, and saved-audio status.
asi.gap: Realtime sessions still do not create history entries with turnCount/turnStatus because realtime orchestration is not wired.

description: Disable unavailable cloud modes in settings picker

asi.hypothesis: Cloud modes should remain visible but disabled with a reason when Offline Mode or missing API key makes them unavailable.
asi.learned: Dictation Mode select keeps OpenAI modes visible but disables them in Offline Mode and when no API key is stored, appending a short reason to the option label.
asi.ux_gap: Consent-required mode is not disabled in picker; readiness gate still blocks before recording until consent is accepted.

description: Allow cloud mode selection before API key setup

asi.hypothesis: Settings picker should follow the PRD: cloud modes remain selectable before API key setup, but dictation is blocked before recording.
asi.learned: OpenAI modes are disabled only in Offline Mode; missing API key is shown as a setup hint in the option label while readiness still blocks recording until a key is stored.
asi.fixes_previous: Corrects prior UX violation where missing API key disabled cloud mode selection.

description: Stop active cloud recording when Offline Mode is enabled

asi.hypothesis: Offline Mode is the cloud kill switch and must terminate active cloud dictation immediately, not just block future sessions.
asi.learned: Renderer updateSettings now detects Offline Mode enabling during an active cloud-mode recording, stops and discards the recorder output, hides overlay, clears hotkey recording state, stops coordination/unmutes, and shows a clear message.
asi.scope_note: This covers renderer-managed file recording sessions; fully wired realtime sessions will need provider socket stop as well.

description: Show cloud provider status while transcribing

asi.hypothesis: Cloud boundary should stay visible while active, including after recording stops during non-realtime cloud transcription.
asi.learned: Overlay showTranscribing now accepts partial overlay state; stop/transcribe path checks readiness and sets Cloud Dictation provider label plus OpenAI transcribing message for cloud modes, while local remains unchanged.
asi.privacy_boundary: Status label is metadata only; no Prompt Pack or transcript text is shown/logged.

description: Use shared mode metadata for OpenAI test model selection

asi.hypothesis: Reusing Dictation Mode metadata for test connection avoids drift between UI mode IDs and actual OpenAI model IDs.
asi.learned: Main test-connection handler now resolves mode with getDictationMode and tests its modelId when the selected mode is OpenAI, falling back to gpt-4o-transcribe for local selections.
asi.metric_note: Added acceptance probes for shared metadata lookup to avoid reintroducing brittle nested mode-to-model mapping.

description: Add Cloud Prompt Pack preview action

asi.hypothesis: Users need an explicit debug/settings preview of compact context that may be sent to cloud, without interrupting each dictation.
asi.learned: Main exposes transcription:preview-prompt-pack for cloud modes, preload/renderer add a Prompt Pack preview action, and preview uses dictionary-only context (includeOcrContext false) to avoid sending/displaying OCR text by default.
asi.privacy_boundary: Preview is user-initiated, capped by existing Prompt Pack builder, and does not include screenshots/transcript history/full dictionary.

description: Fallback to local mode when profile forbids cloud

asi.hypothesis: Profiles that forbid Cloud Dictation should automatically use local dictation when a cloud mode would otherwise be effective.
asi.learned: Shared readiness and TranscriptionService mode resolution now map forbidden cloud requests to local.balanced instead of simply blocking, allowing sensitive profiles to remain usable with local dictation.
asi.caveat: If the local balanced model is not downloaded, existing renderer local model readiness may still need to surface the correct download requirement.

description: Keep active local model aligned with selected local Dictation Mode

asi.hypothesis: Beginner local Dictation Mode selection should update the exact local model so existing readiness/download UI remains accurate.
asi.learned: Settings UI now maps local.fast/local.balanced/local.accuracy to their mode model IDs when selected, while local.custom and OpenAI modes leave activeModelId unchanged.
asi.bug_avoided: Prevents selecting local.accuracy while the app still checks/downloads/transcribes against a stale activeModelId.

description: Add realtime audio append and commit methods

asi.hypothesis: Realtime provider needs explicit PCM16 append and commit operations before native helper streaming can be connected.
asi.learned: OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider now exposes appendPcm16Audio (base64 input_audio_buffer.append) and commitAudio (input_audio_buffer.commit) with connected-state checks.
asi.gap: No resampling/chunking from native capture to 24 kHz PCM is wired yet.

description: Require provider-aware 24 kHz PCM realtime audio config

asi.hypothesis: Realtime cloud should encode provider-aware audio requirements in shared ASR types and validate them before opening an OpenAI session, preventing accidental wrong-format streaming.
asi.learned: Added StreamingAudioConfig/openAiRealtimeAudioConfig with 24 kHz PCM16 mono requirement; OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider rejects incompatible configs and includes explicit input_audio_transcription model setup in session.update.
asi.metric_note: Added acceptance probes for provider-aware realtime audio config because this is a PRD requirement, not a benchmark-only string.

description: Add cloud session duration limit model

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation needs explicit warn/finalize duration limits so realtime and non-realtime cloud sessions have a shared policy before orchestration is wired.
asi.learned: Added persisted cloudSessionWarnMs/cloudSessionMaxMs defaults of 5 and 10 minutes, sanitization bounds, and shared getCloudSessionLimitState helper that returns warn/stop state and user-facing messages only for cloud modes.
asi.gap: The helper is not yet wired into recording timers to actually warn or auto-finalize active sessions.

description: Wire cloud session duration timer into recording flow

asi.hypothesis: The shared cloud duration policy should actively warn and finalize cloud recordings, not just exist as a helper.
asi.learned: Renderer now starts a cloud-only session limit timer after recording begins, warns once at the configured threshold, auto-stops/transcribes at the max duration, clears the timer on stop/unmount/offline kill, and leaves local recordings unaffected.
asi.risk: Auto-stop calls stopAndTranscribe from a timer; future realtime orchestration should ensure provider socket finalization uses the same stop path.

description: Add realtime latency presets for OpenAI server VAD

asi.hypothesis: Realtime cloud needs user-facing Fast/Balanced/Accurate latency presets that map to conservative OpenAI server VAD timing, rather than exposing raw thresholds.
asi.learned: Added persisted realtimeLatencyPreset defaulting to balanced, shared getOpenAiRealtimeVadConfig mapping presets to server_vad threshold/padding/silence timing, passed latencyPreset through StreamingAsrRequest into OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider session.update, and added a settings selector.
asi.privacy_boundary: No transcript/audio/prompt data is logged or exposed; this only changes realtime control metadata.

description: Add metadata-only cloud dictation log guard

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation needs an explicit metadata-only logging boundary so future provider/orchestration code cannot accidentally log API keys, audio, Prompt Pack, transcript text, screenshots, or raw provider responses.
asi.learned: Added shared cloud logging types/helper that create provider/model/mode/duration/status/errorCode entries and reject sensitive field names. Cloud file transcription now creates started/completed metadata-only log entries and asserts them before continuing.
asi.privacy_boundary: The log helper deliberately stores only metadata and sanitizes error codes; no secret/audio/prompt/transcript payload is accepted.

description: Record metadata-only failed cloud transcription events

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation failure handling should preserve actionable metadata without risking sensitive payload logging.
asi.learned: Cloud file transcription now wraps OpenAI provider failures, creates a metadata-only failed log entry with provider/model/mode/duration and sanitized error code, asserts the log boundary, then rethrows the original user-facing error.
asi.privacy_boundary: Failure logs still reject sensitive field names and do not include audio, Prompt Pack, transcript text, provider response bodies, or API keys.

description: Keep overlay visible in finalizing state before insertion

asi.hypothesis: After transcription completes, the recording overlay should remain visible in a provider-aware Finalizing state until insertion/copy work succeeds or fails, matching realtime and cloud UX requirements.
asi.learned: Added main/preload showFinalizing overlay API and use it in stopAndTranscribe after transcript result arrives but before insertion/copy. Cloud sessions show 'Finalizing cloud dictation' with Cloud Dictation label; local sessions show local finalizing text.
asi.privacy_boundary: Finalizing overlay contains provider/status metadata only; it does not show transcript, Prompt Pack, audio, or target contents.

description: Treat exact local model selection as local custom mode

asi.hypothesis: The PRD requires beginner Dictation Modes to be distinct from exact local Whisper model picks; selecting an exact model should switch to local.custom and remember that model ID.
asi.learned: Model picker actions now use exactLocalModelSettingsPatch, setting activeModelId, localCustomModelId, and dictationModeId=local.custom for release and dev model selection paths. Beginner Dictation Mode selection still maps local.fast/balanced/accuracy to their mode model IDs.
asi.bug_avoided: Prevents the UI from claiming local.balanced/local.accuracy while the user has explicitly selected a different exact Whisper model.

description: Add history metadata for unavailable audio playback

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation history needs a provider-neutral way to explain why audio playback is unavailable without pretending audio was saved.
asi.learned: TranscriptEntry now supports audioUnavailableReason, history-store validation preserves it, and history rows display the reason and use it as the disabled playback tooltip. Existing local and non-realtime cloud audio behavior remains unchanged.
asi.next_action_hint: When realtime orchestration writes history, set audioUnavailableReason to a concise message such as 'Realtime cloud audio playback is not saved' and leave audioFileName undefined.

description: Add developer-only realtime VAD threshold override

asi.hypothesis: Raw OpenAI server VAD threshold should remain developer/debug-only while normal users use Fast/Balanced/Accurate presets.
asi.learned: Added nullable realtimeVadThresholdOverride setting, sanitized clamp, developer-mode-only settings control, StreamingAsrRequest field, and OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider wiring so the override only changes server_vad.threshold while preserving preset padding/silence timing.
asi.privacy_boundary: This is control metadata only; no audio/transcript/Prompt Pack data is logged or exposed.

description: Disable unreleased realtime cloud mode with visible reason

asi.hypothesis: Release UI should not let users select openai.realtime until realtime streaming is actually wired, while still keeping the mode visible with a clear reason as required for unavailable modes.
asi.learned: Added shared getDictationModeAvailability and used it in the Dictation Mode picker. Offline Mode disables all cloud modes, missing API key remains a selectable setup hint, and openai.realtime is disabled with 'Realtime streaming is not available yet' until realtimeStreamingReady is true.
asi.prd_alignment: Avoids exposing a nonfunctional realtime mode as selectable before all three OpenAI modes are functional.

description: Force saved-audio retranscription to local custom mode

asi.hypothesis: Retranscribing saved local audio from history should not unexpectedly upload that audio to OpenAI just because the current global Dictation Mode is cloud.
asi.learned: Added forceModeId context plumbing for transcription IPC/service and use it from saved-audio retranscription to force local.custom. Normal dictation still resolves the selected/profile mode, but history retranscription uses local custom with current exact local model.
asi.privacy_boundary: Prevents history audio playback/retranscription path from crossing the cloud boundary accidentally.

description: Show persistent active provider badge in UI

asi.hypothesis: When Cloud Dictation is selected, the main UI should make the cloud/local provider boundary visible even before a recording starts.
asi.learned: Renderer now derives activeDictationMode/activeProviderLabel from settings and shows a provider badge in Settings plus a toolbar code pill. Cloud modes use a warning-toned 'Cloud Dictation' label; local modes use success-toned 'Local dictation'.
asi.privacy_boundary: The badge displays mode/provider metadata only; it does not reveal prompt, transcript, target, or credential data.

description: Make release readiness checklist cloud-aware

asi.hypothesis: The setup checklist should not demand local model/runtime readiness when an OpenAI cloud mode is selected; instead it should surface cloud consent/API-key prerequisites.
asi.learned: Release readiness now treats cloud modes as not requiring a downloaded local model or installed whisper.cpp runtime, adds a Cloud setup checklist item, and requires consent plus stored API key before reporting ready for cloud dictation.
asi.ux_alignment: Matches the PRD requirement that cloud modes may be selected before API key setup but dictation is blocked before recording until setup is complete.

description: Filter local Whisper prompt override from Cloud Prompt Pack

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Prompt Pack must not accidentally include local-only whisperPromptOverride or style/rewriting instructions if they leak into dictionary-style prompt context.
asi.learned: Cloud Prompt Pack builder now filters terms that look like whisper prompt override/style/rewrite/format instructions before applying caps. It still includes ranked dictionary/OCR terms through the existing consent-controlled path.
asi.privacy_boundary: This reinforces the rule that whisperPromptOverride is local Whisper only and initial Cloud Prompt Pack remains concise keyword-style context.

description: Make Cloud Prompt Pack preview honor OCR opt-in

asi.hypothesis: The Prompt Pack preview should accurately show OCR Context only when the user has enabled OCR-to-cloud, matching actual cloud submission behavior.
asi.learned: Preview IPC now accepts processName plus optional OCR context, uses settings.cloudPromptPackOcrEnabled to decide includeOcrContext, and renderer only passes latest OCR context when that setting is enabled. Non-cloud modes still return no preview.
asi.privacy_boundary: OCR terms remain excluded from preview and cloud Prompt Pack unless the explicit OCR-to-cloud setting is enabled.

description: Add OpenAI pricing privacy and API documentation links

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation consent/setup should provide direct links to OpenAI pricing, privacy, and API documentation so BYOK users can evaluate cost and data handling without extra legal checkboxes.
asi.learned: Settings consent copy now includes external links to OpenAI API pricing, privacy policy, and API model docs, styled as inline documentation links. This is UI-only and does not change cloud behavior.
asi.prd_alignment: Satisfies PRD guidance that settings link to OpenAI API pricing/privacy/data docs while not requiring a separate OpenAI legal checkbox.

description: Replace OpenAI API key prompt with masked setup field

asi.hypothesis: API key setup should use an explicit masked settings field instead of window.prompt, improving UX while keeping secrets out of settings JSON and clearing the draft after save.
asi.learned: Settings now has an OpenAI API key password input backed by transient React state, Save is disabled until non-empty, save clears the draft, and existing credential IPC still stores only through OS-encrypted storage/status.
asi.privacy_boundary: The API key remains transient in renderer state until saved and is never read back from main; status still exposes only hasApiKey.

description: Add cloud session duration controls to settings UI

asi.hypothesis: Users need visible controls for cloud warning and maximum duration limits now that the recording flow enforces them, especially for advanced users who may need longer sessions.
asi.learned: Settings now exposes minute-based Cloud session warning and Cloud session maximum inputs, wired to cloudSessionWarnMs/cloudSessionMaxMs. Existing settings sanitization still clamps values and defaults remain 5/10 minutes.
asi.privacy_boundary: This only exposes duration control metadata; no cost estimate, transcript, audio, Prompt Pack, or target data is shown.

description: Support unlimited cloud session duration setting

asi.hypothesis: The PRD allows advanced users to increase or remove the cloud duration cap; the app should model unlimited sessions explicitly rather than requiring a huge numeric cap.
asi.learned: cloudSessionMaxMs now accepts null for unlimited, sanitization preserves null, cloud session limit state never auto-stops when max is null while still warning at the configured threshold, and the settings UI uses a blank max-duration field for unlimited.
asi.privacy_boundary: This changes only duration-control metadata and does not add live cost estimates or sensitive data exposure.

description: Show elapsed time in cloud recording overlay

asi.hypothesis: Cloud sessions, especially unlimited ones, need persistent elapsed time and cloud badge/status without live cost estimates.
asi.learned: RecordingOverlayState now carries elapsedMs, recording overlay show API accepts provider state, cloud recording starts at 'Cloud Dictation 0:00', and the cloud session timer updates overlay elapsed time every second while retaining Cloud Dictation provider label.
asi.privacy_boundary: Overlay shows duration/provider metadata only; no transcript, Prompt Pack, audio, cost estimate, or target content is displayed.

description: Add realtime cloud history entry builder

asi.hypothesis: Realtime orchestration will need a single provider-neutral way to turn accumulated transcript turns into a safe history entry without saved audio.
asi.learned: Added shared createRealtimeCloudHistoryEntry that composes final/fallback turns, records provider/mode/model/duration/turn count/status, preserves raw provider text when corrections change it, and sets audioUnavailableReason to 'Realtime cloud audio playback is not saved'.
asi.gap: Realtime provider is still not wired into the main dictation lifecycle; this prepares correct history semantics once streaming sessions produce turns.

description: Add realtime cloud history service with correction memory

asi.hypothesis: Realtime cloud history should apply explicit dictionary correction memory before saving, just like file-based local and cloud transcription, while still avoiding OCR heuristic corrections.
asi.learned: Added createCorrectedRealtimeCloudHistoryEntry and RealtimeCloudHistoryService. The service composes realtime turns, applies DictionaryStore.applyCorrections, stores correctionsApplied, saves a history entry via HistoryStore, and preserves the no-audio realtime metadata.
asi.privacy_boundary: No Prompt Pack, transcript history, provider responses, or audio are logged/sent; this only applies local explicit correction memory to provider text before local history storage.

description: Clear realtime VAD threshold override outside developer mode

asi.hypothesis: Developer-only realtime VAD threshold must not persist or apply when developer mode is disabled, even if an old settings file contains an override.
asi.learned: Settings sanitization now preserves realtimeVadThresholdOverride only when developerModeEnabled is true; otherwise it is forced to null. Sanitization was refactored into sanitizeRealtimeVadThresholdOverride.
asi.privacy_boundary: This is debug control metadata only; no user content, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack, transcript, or provider response is exposed.

description: Add realtime cloud session wrapper for preview updates

asi.hypothesis: Realtime streaming needs an orchestration wrapper that connects the OpenAI realtime provider to overlay Live Preview and carries settings-derived audio/VAD config before full native streaming integration.
asi.learned: Added RealtimeCloudSession main-process helper that starts OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider with openAiRealtimeAudioConfig, latency preset, developer VAD override, and Prompt Pack; preview callbacks update overlay livePreviewTurns with Cloud Dictation label; session can append PCM16 audio and finalize to a startedAt/turns snapshot.
asi.gap: Still not wired into the renderer/native capture lifecycle; this is the integration seam for future realtime dictation.

description: Require cloud consent before building Prompt Pack

asi.hypothesis: Prompt Pack construction itself should enforce Cloud Dictation consent so future preview/realtime code cannot accidentally prepare cloud-bound context before consent.
asi.learned: buildCloudPromptPack now requires consentAccepted and throws before reading dictionary/OCR context when consent is false. Existing cloud transcription and preview callers pass settings.cloudDictationConsentAccepted after readiness checks.
asi.privacy_boundary: This moves the consent boundary closer to context preparation, reducing risk that dictionary/OCR terms are prepared for cloud paths without explicit consent.

description: Clamp cloud max duration to warning threshold

asi.hypothesis: Cloud session max duration should not sanitize below the warning threshold; otherwise users could configure a warning that never appears before auto-finalize.
asi.learned: Settings sanitization now routes cloudSessionMaxMs through sanitizeCloudSessionMaxMs, preserving null/unlimited, defaulting invalid values, and clamping numeric max to at least the sanitized warning duration. Settings UI reflects the normalized max minutes.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only duration control metadata changed; no cost estimate or sensitive content exposure.

description: Classify OpenAI errors into friendly setup categories

asi.hypothesis: BYOK users need actionable OpenAI error messages for invalid key, billing/quota, rate limit, and model access problems without exposing provider response bodies.
asi.learned: Added shared OpenAI error classifier/formatter and wired OpenAiFileAsrProvider to use it. Errors now have friendly summaries plus metadata-only technical details based on status/type/code, while provider response bodies remain excluded.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only status, statusText, error type, and error code are surfaced as technical details; raw provider message/body is used only for classification and not included verbatim.

description: Add explicit no automatic local fallback policy for cloud failures

asi.hypothesis: Cloud failure handling should encode the privacy policy that VoxType does not automatically retry failed cloud dictation locally, except separate profile-forbid local routing before cloud starts.
asi.learned: Added shared getCloudFailurePolicy returning allowAutomaticLocalFallback=false for cloud modes with a user-facing explanation that automatic local retry could change privacy and accuracy expectations.
asi.privacy_boundary: Prevents future error-recovery code from silently changing provider boundary after a cloud failure.

description: Make release settings panel scrollable

asi.hypothesis: As Cloud Dictation adds more setup controls, the release Settings page needs the same internal scrolling behavior as Models/Profiles/History to keep all settings reachable in the fixed-size window.
asi.learned: Settings panel now uses the existing release-scroll-panel pattern and .settings-list participates in the scrollable content selector, matching the models page behavior requested by the user.
asi.ux_alignment: Prevents newly added cloud controls from pushing lower settings out of reach without changing settings semantics.

description: Apply cloud no-fallback policy to transcription failures

asi.hypothesis: The explicit no-automatic-local-fallback policy should be surfaced on actual cloud transcription failures, not just exist as a shared policy helper.
asi.learned: Cloud file transcription failure handling now fetches getCloudFailurePolicy(mode.id) after metadata-only failure logging and prepends the user-facing no-local-retry explanation before rethrowing the OpenAI error details.
asi.privacy_boundary: Failure path still logs only metadata and does not retry locally or expose audio, Prompt Pack, transcript text, provider response bodies, or API keys.

description: Validate cloud history metadata when loading transcript history

asi.hypothesis: Now that history entries include provider, mode, turn, and realtime no-audio metadata, history loading should validate those fields so corrupted or stale entries do not break cloud-aware UI.
asi.learned: HistoryStore validation now accepts only providerId local-whisper/openai, validates dictationModeId with isDictationModeId, and checks turnCount/turnStatus types while preserving backwards compatibility for entries without those optional fields.
asi.privacy_boundary: Validation only covers local history metadata and does not add sensitive storage.

description: Show provider label in recent history cards

asi.hypothesis: Recent history on the home screen should show whether a transcript came from Cloud Dictation or local dictation, making cloud provenance visible outside the detailed History tab.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed and UI change was real, but the existing primary metric already counted provider-label rendering elsewhere and did not improve.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged, so autoresearch rules require discard.
asi.next_action_hint: If pursuing this UX improvement, first add a distinct acceptance probe for recent-history provider provenance or bundle with a larger measurable history provenance improvement.

description: Show provider provenance in recent history cards

asi.hypothesis: The home screen recent-history cards should show Cloud Dictation vs Local dictation provenance, not just the full History tab, so cloud-originated text remains visibly distinct.
asi.learned: Recent history rows now include a small provider label derived from entry.providerId. Added a distinct acceptance probe for recent-history provenance after the prior attempt was invisible to the metric.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only provider provenance metadata is displayed; no Prompt Pack, transcript history internals, audio, target content, or credentials are exposed.

description: Add provider-specific language hint mapping

asi.hypothesis: Dictation Language is provider-neutral, but provider adapters should translate it into supported provider-specific hints rather than blindly passing settings values.
asi.learned: Added shared getProviderLanguageHint for local-whisper/openai. OpenAI file provider now asks for the OpenAI-specific hint and only sends a language parameter when a non-auto supported hint exists.
asi.privacy_boundary: Language hint is non-sensitive control metadata; no transcript, Prompt Pack, audio, target content, or credentials are exposed.

description: Apply provider language hints to realtime OpenAI sessions

asi.hypothesis: Realtime OpenAI sessions should use the same provider-specific language hint mapping as file transcription so Dictation Language remains provider-neutral across modes.
asi.learned: OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider now passes request.language through getProviderLanguageHint('openai', language) and includes the supported non-auto language in input_audio_transcription. Auto/unsupported hints are omitted.
asi.privacy_boundary: Language is non-sensitive control metadata; no audio, transcript, Prompt Pack, target content, provider response, or credential data is exposed.

description: Restrict OpenAI credential file permissions

asi.hypothesis: Even though the OpenAI API key is encrypted with Electron safeStorage, the credential file should be written with restrictive permissions as defense in depth.
asi.learned: OpenAiCredentialStore now writes the encrypted key file with mode 0600 and best-effort chmods it to 0600 after writing. The API key still never goes into settings JSON and getStatus still returns only hasApiKey.
asi.privacy_boundary: This hardens local secret storage without changing cloud request payloads or exposing credentials.

description: Disable OpenAI test connection in Offline Mode

asi.hypothesis: Offline Mode is the cloud kill switch, so even setup validation should not contact OpenAI while it is enabled.
asi.learned: Main openai:test-connection handler now returns a clear disabled message when settings.offlineMode is true, and the Settings UI disables the Test connection button while Offline Mode is active.
asi.privacy_boundary: Prevents network calls to OpenAI during Offline Mode; no credentials or context are sent.

description: Classify OpenAI realtime error events

asi.hypothesis: Realtime OpenAI provider should use the same friendly metadata-only error classification as file transcription when provider error events arrive.
asi.learned: OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider now detects provider error events, formats them through classifyOpenAiError/formatOpenAiFriendlyError, and throws a friendly error without logging raw provider responses or transcript payloads.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only provider error code/type/message are used for classification; raw responses are not logged or surfaced verbatim.

description: Route realtime OpenAI errors through session callback

asi.hypothesis: Realtime provider error events should be delivered through an explicit callback instead of thrown from an event listener, so orchestration can surface the failure state predictably.
asi.learned: OpenAiRealtimeAsrProvider now supports RealtimeErrorCallback and calls it with friendly classified errors. RealtimeCloudSession wires that callback to update the overlay in Finalizing state with Cloud Dictation label and the friendly error message.
asi.privacy_boundary: Errors remain classified/friendly and metadata-only; no raw provider responses, transcript text, Prompt Pack, audio, target content, or API key is surfaced.

description: Make realtime cloud session finalization idempotent

asi.hypothesis: Realtime session orchestration needs safe finalize/cancel semantics so hotkey stop, error handling, offline kill switch, and duration auto-stop do not double-commit or double-close the OpenAI socket.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession now tracks finalized state, makes finalize idempotent, adds cancel that stops without committing audio, and shares a snapshot helper for startedAt/turns.
asi.privacy_boundary: This is lifecycle control only; no additional payloads, logs, or cloud data are introduced.

description: Clear cloud overlay metadata when hiding overlay

asi.hypothesis: Cloud overlay metadata such as provider label, elapsed time, and live preview turns should not persist into later local recordings after the overlay is hidden.
asi.learned: hideOverlay now clears cloudProviderLabel, elapsedMs, and livePreviewTurns alongside visible/level reset, preventing stale cloud status or preview text from leaking into subsequent overlay sessions.
asi.privacy_boundary: This reduces accidental display of stale live preview transcript text; no new cloud data flow is introduced.

description: Centralize OpenAI transcription model IDs

asi.hypothesis: OpenAI model IDs should be centralized so the realtime model remains exactly gpt-realtime-whisper across mode metadata, WebSocket URL, session validation, and transcription config.
asi.learned: Added shared OPENAI_REALTIME_WHISPER_MODEL_ID, OPENAI_TRANSCRIBE_MODEL_ID, and OPENAI_MINI_TRANSCRIBE_MODEL_ID constants. Dictation modes, realtime provider URL/validation/session config, and test-connection fallback now reference shared constants instead of duplicated literals.
asi.user_feedback: User explicitly reminded that the realtime model is called gpt-realtime-whisper; this change prevents future drift or accidental rename.
asi.privacy_boundary: No runtime behavior or data flow changed beyond model ID consistency.

description: Move OpenAI model constants into dedicated model map

asi.hypothesis: OpenAI model IDs and mode-to-model mapping deserve a dedicated shared module so providers, mode metadata, and setup validation all resolve from one authoritative map.
asi.learned: Added shared openai-models.ts with OPENAI_REALTIME_WHISPER_MODEL_ID=gpt-realtime-whisper, file transcription model constants, openAiModeModelIds, and getOpenAiModelIdForMode. Realtime provider and test-connection handler now import from this dedicated map.
asi.user_feedback: Preserves the user's correction that the realtime model ID is exactly gpt-realtime-whisper while reducing future drift.
asi.privacy_boundary: No data flow changes; only model metadata organization.

description: Gate release cloud mode selection until all OpenAI modes are ready

asi.hypothesis: The normal release UI should not allow selecting Cloud Dictation until all three OpenAI modes, including realtime gpt-realtime-whisper, are functional.
asi.learned: Dictation mode availability now accepts allOpenAiModesReadyForRelease and disables every OpenAI mode with a clear reason until that flag is true. Release Settings currently passes false because realtime streaming remains unwired.
asi.prd_alignment: Matches the PRD requirement that the release UI exposes Cloud Dictation only once all three OpenAI modes are functional, while keeping unavailable modes visible with a reason.
asi.privacy_boundary: This is a UI selection gate only; it reduces accidental cloud use and does not change payload handling.

description: Allow developer-mode preview of cloud mode selection

asi.hypothesis: Normal release UI should gate Cloud Dictation until all OpenAI modes are ready, but developer/debug mode needs a way to select cloud modes for staged testing without changing release behavior.
asi.learned: Renderer now computes developerCloudModePreviewEnabled from isDeveloperBuild and developerModeEnabled, and uses it for realtimeStreamingReady/allOpenAiModesReadyForRelease in mode availability. Packaged/non-developer UI remains gated until all modes are ready.
asi.prd_alignment: Preserves release gating while honoring the PRD allowance that developer/debug UI may expose partial cloud work for testing.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only selection availability changes; consent/API-key/offline/profile gates still block actual cloud recording as before.

description: Clarify realtime mode cannot use completed WAV file transcription path

asi.hypothesis: If a developer selects openai.realtime before full streaming wiring, the file transcription path should fail with a precise explanation that realtime requires streaming capture rather than saying it is generally unavailable.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed and the message was clearer, but primary metric did not improve because an existing broad realtime error probe masked the added specificity.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged; autoresearch rules require discard.
asi.next_action_hint: If retrying, add a distinct acceptance probe for the streaming-capture-specific realtime error or combine with actual realtime routing work.

description: Clarify realtime mode requires streaming capture path

asi.hypothesis: Developer-mode selection of openai.realtime should fail precisely in the completed-WAV file transcription path, explaining that realtime uses streaming capture instead of implying the mode itself is unavailable.
asi.learned: TranscriptionService now reports that Realtime Cloud Dictation uses streaming capture and cannot transcribe a completed WAV file. Added a distinct acceptance probe so this UX correctness is tracked separately from generic realtime availability.
asi.privacy_boundary: No new cloud calls or payload handling; only improves local error messaging before a mismatched code path can upload anything.

description: Add realtime cloud cancellation reason for Offline Mode

asi.hypothesis: Realtime cloud sessions need explicit cancellation reasons so future offline kill-switch wiring can stop the socket and show a clear provider-aware state without committing audio.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession.cancel now accepts a reason, stops without commit, updates overlay to Finalizing with Cloud Dictation label and existing turns, and cancelForOfflineMode provides the specific Offline Mode message.
asi.privacy_boundary: Cancellation only updates lifecycle/status metadata and keeps existing preview turns local; no new cloud payloads or logs are introduced.

description: Expose Prompt Pack caps in preview metadata

asi.hypothesis: Prompt Pack preview should make the 50-term and 1000-character limits visible to users/debuggers so the compact cloud context boundary is understandable.
asi.learned: PromptPack now carries termLimit=50 and characterLimit=1000, buildCloudPromptPack populates those fields from the constants, and preview text shows used/limit counts plus truncation status.
asi.privacy_boundary: Preview still only displays user-requested capped Prompt Pack text after consent/cloud-mode gating; no screenshots/full dictionary/transcript history are included.

description: Share Prompt Pack limit constants across UI and builder

asi.hypothesis: Prompt Pack caps should live in a shared module so UI copy, PromptPack metadata, and builder enforcement cannot drift from the 50-term/1000-character privacy boundary.
asi.learned: Added shared prompt-pack-limits.ts with PROMPT_PACK_MAX_TERMS and PROMPT_PACK_MAX_CHARS, typed PromptPack limits from it, imported limits in builder, and updated Settings copy to render the shared constants.
asi.privacy_boundary: Keeps the compact cloud context cap consistent across enforcement and user-facing preview/copy.

description: Normalize cloud rawText history metadata

asi.hypothesis: Cloud history rawText should represent normalized provider-final text before local corrections, not raw provider formatting noise, matching the PRD history contract.
asi.learned: OpenAI file transcription now compares/stores normalizedText for rawText instead of raw providerText, and realtime history normalizes composed/corrected provider text before deciding whether rawText differs.
asi.privacy_boundary: This changes local history metadata only; no provider response bodies are logged or sent elsewhere.

description: Make cloud preview gate depend on build type not Developer Mode UI

asi.hypothesis: Developer Mode is only an alternate UI surface, so developer cloud mode preview should depend on running a developer build, not on the developerModeEnabled setting.
asi.learned: Typecheck passed and the user correction is valid, but primary metric was unchanged after updating the probe because the previous broader probe still matched.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric unchanged; autoresearch rules require discard.
asi.next_action_hint: Reapply with a distinct negative probe that ensures developerCloudModePreviewEnabled no longer references developerModeEnabled, or bundle with related mode availability cleanup.

description: Gate developer cloud preview by build type only

asi.hypothesis: Developer Mode is just an alternate UI surface, so staged cloud mode selection should depend on running a developer build, not on the developerModeEnabled setting.
asi.learned: developerCloudModePreviewEnabled now equals isDeveloperBuild only. Added a negative acceptance probe to prevent reintroducing a dependency on developerModeEnabled for this release/developer cloud availability gate.
asi.user_feedback: Implements user's correction that state.settings?.developerModeEnabled should not control developerCloudModePreviewEnabled.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only selection availability in developer builds changes; consent/API-key/offline/profile gates still protect actual cloud use.

description: Separate release readiness flags from developer cloud preview override

asi.hypothesis: Cloud mode availability should distinguish actual release readiness from the developer-build override so future realtime/file readiness can be wired without conflating it with dev preview access.
asi.learned: Renderer now defines openAiModesReadyForRelease=false and realtimeStreamingReady=false separately, then derives cloudModeSelectionReady/realtimeModeSelectionReady by OR-ing those release flags with developerCloudModePreviewEnabled. Availability receives the derived flags.
asi.user_feedback: Keeps Developer Mode UI setting out of cloud preview logic while making build-vs-readiness semantics clearer.
asi.privacy_boundary: Selection gating only; cloud consent/API-key/offline/profile enforcement remains unchanged.

description: Show cloud release gate status in settings

asi.hypothesis: Since cloud selection now depends on release readiness plus developer-build preview, Settings should make that gate state visible so users/testers understand why modes are available or disabled.
asi.learned: Settings header now shows a cloud gate chip: Developer build cloud preview, Cloud Dictation ready, or Cloud Dictation release-gated, based on the separated readiness/preview flags.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only capability/status metadata is displayed; no cloud payloads, credentials, Prompt Pack, transcript, audio, or target content is exposed.

description: Track OpenAI mode implementation readiness explicitly

asi.hypothesis: Release gating should be driven by explicit per-mode implementation readiness rather than opaque hard-coded booleans in the renderer.
asi.learned: Added shared openai-readiness.ts with fileAccuracyReady=true, fileEconomyReady=true, realtimeReady=false, plus areAllOpenAiModesReadyForRelease. Renderer now derives release gating and realtime readiness from that shared readiness object.
asi.prd_alignment: Makes it clear that non-realtime OpenAI modes are implemented, but release Cloud Dictation remains gated because realtime gpt-realtime-whisper is not fully wired.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only capability metadata changed; no cloud payload or credential handling changed.

description: Use per-mode OpenAI readiness in mode availability

asi.hypothesis: Mode availability should distinguish a specific OpenAI mode being unimplemented from the broader release gate that waits for all OpenAI modes.
asi.learned: Added isOpenAiModeImplemented and passed openAiReadiness into getDictationModeAvailability. Availability now first checks whether the individual OpenAI mode is implemented, then applies the broader all-modes release gate.
asi.prd_alignment: Allows accurate reasons: realtime can say it is not implemented yet while accuracy/economy can be implemented but still release-gated until all modes are ready.
asi.privacy_boundary: Selection reason metadata only; no change to cloud payloads or provider calls.

description: Add structured reason codes for dictation mode availability

asi.hypothesis: Mode availability should expose structured reason codes in addition to display text, so UI/tests/future logic do not depend on parsing human-readable strings.
asi.learned: DictationModeAvailability now includes reasonCode values for offline, mode_not_implemented, release_gated, realtime_not_ready, and api_key_required. Existing reason strings remain for UI display.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local availability metadata changed; no provider calls, cloud payloads, or sensitive data handling changed.

description: Expose OpenAI credential source and encryption status

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation setup should distinguish environment-provided API keys from stored BYOK credentials and expose OS encryption availability so users understand what VoxType stores.
asi.learned: Added shared OpenAiCredentialStatus, OpenAiCredentialStore.getStatus, IPC/preload typing, and Settings copy that reports OPENAI_API_KEY environment use without implying VoxType stored it. Status also carries safeStorage encryption availability.
asi.privacy_boundary: No API key value is exposed; only metadata source/encryption availability is returned to the renderer.

description: Prevent clearing environment-provided OpenAI keys

asi.hypothesis: When Cloud Dictation uses OPENAI_API_KEY from the environment, the Settings UI should not offer a misleading clear action because VoxType has no stored key to remove.
asi.learned: The OpenAI credential clear button is now labeled for stored keys and disabled when credential status reports source=environment, while stored BYOK credentials remain clearable.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only credential metadata controls UI affordances; API key values remain inaccessible to the renderer.

description: Centralize Cloud Dictation consent copy

asi.hypothesis: Consent wording is part of the privacy boundary and should be centralized so setup UI consistently states what is and is not sent to OpenAI.
asi.learned: Added shared cloud consent copy for the microphone/Prompt Pack disclosure, explicit exclusions including insertion target contents, and Offline Mode/profile blocking notice; Settings renders that shared copy.
asi.privacy_boundary: Improves disclosure only; no new cloud payload, credential, audio, transcript, OCR, or Prompt Pack flow is introduced.

description: Record Cloud Dictation consent timestamp

asi.hypothesis: One-time Cloud Dictation consent should retain when the user accepted it so setup state is auditable without storing sensitive data.
asi.learned: Settings now include cloudDictationConsentAcceptedAt, default it to null, stamp it only on false-to-true consent transitions, clear it when consent is revoked, sanitize persisted values, and show the accepted date in Settings.
asi.privacy_boundary: The timestamp is consent metadata only; it contains no audio, transcripts, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, target content, or API key material.

description: Block OpenAI test connection without API key

asi.hypothesis: The OpenAI test-connection IPC should enforce the same setup boundary as recording and avoid any network attempt when no API key is configured.
asi.learned: openai:test-connection now checks hasApiKey after the Offline Mode kill switch and returns a clear local setup error before resolving a model or calling the provider.
asi.privacy_boundary: This reduces accidental network behavior; no key, audio, Prompt Pack, transcript, screenshot, or target content is sent.

description: Explain disabled OpenAI test connection states

asi.hypothesis: When the OpenAI test connection button is disabled, Settings should explain whether Offline Mode or missing API key setup is responsible.
asi.learned: The test-connection button now has state-specific title text for Offline Mode, missing API key, and the ready-to-test state, matching IPC setup gates.
asi.privacy_boundary: UI metadata only; no additional network calls or sensitive data exposure.

description: Add structured Cloud Dictation readiness reason codes

asi.hypothesis: Cloud Dictation readiness should expose stable machine-readable reason codes so UI and orchestration can branch on setup/offline/API-key states without parsing user-facing strings.
asi.learned: CloudDictationReadiness now includes reasonCode for local_ready, offline_mode, consent_required, api_key_required, and cloud_ready while preserving existing reason text.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local readiness metadata changed; no provider calls or sensitive payload handling changed.

description: Clarify Cloud setup readiness details

asi.hypothesis: The release setup checklist should tell users exactly which Cloud Dictation setup gate remains: consent, API key, environment key, or stored key.
asi.learned: Added cloudSetupDetail in the renderer to distinguish local dictation, missing consent, missing API key, OPENAI_API_KEY environment setup, and stored key readiness instead of one generic setup message.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only setup metadata/copy changed; the renderer still receives no API key value and no cloud payloads are affected.

description: Terminate effective cloud profile sessions on Offline Mode

asi.hypothesis: Offline Mode should terminate any active Cloud Dictation session based on the effective mode, including App Profile overrides, not just the global settings mode.
asi.learned: Renderer offline-mode handling now checks activeModeIsCloud when deciding whether to stop recording, so cloud sessions selected by profile override are covered by the kill switch.
asi.privacy_boundary: This strengthens the Offline Mode cloud kill switch and does not add any cloud payloads or sensitive data handling.

description: Expose profile cloud-forbid fallback in readiness

asi.hypothesis: Cloud readiness should preserve the originally requested effective mode and indicate when an App Profile forbids cloud, so fallback to local dictation is explicit rather than silent.
asi.learned: CloudDictationReadiness now includes requestedModeId and profileForbidsCloud. When a profile-forbidden cloud mode falls back to Local balanced, readiness returns a clear reason while staying ready for local dictation.
asi.privacy_boundary: This only exposes local routing metadata and strengthens profile cloud-block transparency; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, or transcript data are added.

description: Notify when profile forces local dictation

asi.hypothesis: When an App Profile forbids Cloud Dictation and readiness falls back to local dictation, the user should see that routing decision instead of silently recording locally.
asi.learned: startRecording now displays the readiness reason as a busy message when profileForbidsCloud is true, making profile-enforced local fallback visible while still allowing local dictation to proceed.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local routing/status UI changed; no cloud call, credential, audio, Prompt Pack, OCR, screenshot, transcript, or target content handling changed.

description: Validate local fallback model from readiness mode

asi.hypothesis: When readiness resolves a cloud request to a local fallback mode, recording should validate the fallback mode's required local model rather than whatever model is currently active in settings.
asi.learned: startRecording now derives readinessMode from readiness.modeId, finds readinessLocalModel by that mode's modelId, and reports the exact fallback model label/model ID that must be downloaded before recording.
asi.privacy_boundary: This only affects local preflight validation and error copy; no cloud calls, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack, OCR, screenshots, transcripts, or target content are added.

description: Reuse cloud readiness gates in transcription service

asi.hypothesis: Cloud file transcription should use the same readiness policy as renderer preflight so consent, Offline Mode, API-key, and profile-forbid behavior cannot drift.
asi.learned: Added getCloudDictationReadinessForMode and changed transcribeCloudFile to call it with the requested cloud mode and current API-key status. Removed the duplicate private block-reason method from TranscriptionService.
asi.privacy_boundary: This consolidates local gate checks before any provider call; no new cloud payloads or sensitive data are exposed.

description: Add main-process realtime cloud session IPC

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation needs a main-process session API before the renderer can stream native PCM audio through Electron to OpenAI and save final turn history.
asi.learned: Added active RealtimeCloudSession state, realtime start/append/finalize/cancel IPC handlers, prompt-pack construction at start, readiness gating for openai.realtime, and finalization through RealtimeCloudHistoryService. Preload exposes typed startRealtime, appendRealtimePcm16, finalizeRealtime, and cancelRealtime methods.
asi.privacy_boundary: Realtime start still uses existing readiness/consent/API-key/profile gates, sends only audio plus capped Prompt Pack, and final history stores turn metadata without saved realtime audio.

description: Cancel realtime cloud session on Offline Mode stop

asi.hypothesis: The Offline Mode kill switch should cancel any main-process realtime OpenAI session as well as stopping the renderer/native recorder, so the socket cannot remain open after the user goes offline.
asi.learned: terminateActiveCloudDictationForOfflineMode now calls transcription.cancelRealtime with the Offline Mode reason after stopping the native recorder and before coordination cleanup. The existing realtime-cancel IPC clears active session state in main.
asi.privacy_boundary: This closes a cloud connection on the kill switch and does not send additional audio, Prompt Pack text, transcripts, screenshots, credentials, or target content.

description: Centralize realtime cloud session cancellation

asi.hypothesis: Realtime cloud session cleanup should be centralized and invoked on app shutdown so OpenAI sockets cannot survive replacement, explicit cancel, or VoxType quit paths.
asi.learned: Added cancelActiveRealtimeCloudSession helper, reused it for new-session replacement and realtime-cancel IPC, and call it from will-quit with a shutdown-specific reason before other teardown.
asi.privacy_boundary: This closes/clears cloud session state and does not send additional audio, Prompt Pack text, transcripts, screenshots, credentials, or target content.

description: Wire renderer realtime cloud session lifecycle

asi.hypothesis: Renderer recording orchestration should enter the realtime Cloud Dictation session lifecycle when readiness resolves to openai.realtime, rather than routing the stop path through completed-WAV transcription.
asi.learned: startRecording now starts the main-process realtime session for openai.realtime, cancels it if recorder startup fails, and stopAndTranscribe finalizes realtime sessions through finalizeRealtime with realtime-specific finalizing copy while keeping file/local modes on transcribeWav.
asi.privacy_boundary: Realtime still uses existing readiness gates and capped Prompt Pack construction; this change does not add screenshots, transcript history, full dictionary, target content, or credential exposure.

description: Add native recorder hook for realtime PCM forwarding

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation needs the native recorder path to support forwarding PCM16 chunks to the active main-process realtime session as soon as streaming output becomes available.
asi.learned: WindowsHelperService recording level callback now accepts an optional pcm16Chunk, main recording orchestration forwards chunks to activeRealtimeCloudSession.appendPcm16Audio, and an explicit extractRealtimePcm16Chunk placeholder marks the native-helper integration seam.
asi.privacy_boundary: No audio is forwarded yet because native helper streaming chunks are not emitted; the hook only forwards chunks when present and only to an already gated active realtime session.

description: Buffer realtime audio before OpenAI session connects

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation should tolerate microphone audio arriving before the OpenAI WebSocket is ready by keeping only the allowed short pre-connection PCM buffer and flushing it after connection.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession now buffers pre-connection PCM16 chunks up to 5 seconds at 24 kHz mono, ignores appends after finalization, marks streamingStarted after provider start, and flushes buffered chunks to OpenAI once connected.
asi.privacy_boundary: The buffer is bounded to the PRD pre-connection window and exists only in memory for an active, consent/API-key-gated realtime session; no audio is stored or logged.

description: Report dropped realtime pre-connection audio

asi.hypothesis: If the realtime pre-connection buffer overflows, users should be told that oldest audio was dropped rather than silently losing speech before OpenAI connects.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession now tracks preConnectionDroppedBytes when the 5-second buffer evicts chunks. Finalization surfaces a metadata-only overlay warning if any pre-connection audio was dropped.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only byte counts and warning text are tracked; no audio, transcripts, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, credentials, or target content are logged or persisted.

description: Cancel realtime cloud session on stop-path failures

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation stop handling should cancel the main-process session if VAD detects no speech or finalization fails, preventing stale sockets/session state after stop-path errors.
asi.learned: stopAndTranscribe now tracks the resolved readiness mode, cancels realtime sessions when no speech is detected, and cancels realtime sessions if finalization/transcription throws before cleanup completes.
asi.privacy_boundary: This only closes cloud session state on error paths and sends no extra audio, Prompt Pack text, transcripts, screenshots, credentials, or target content.

description: Show provider-specific stop busy messages

asi.hypothesis: The stop path should not briefly tell users that cloud or realtime dictation is transcribing locally; status text should be based on resolved readiness mode.
asi.learned: stopAndTranscribe now waits for readiness, tracks the resolved mode, and sets busy text to Finalizing realtime cloud dictation, Transcribing with OpenAI, or Transcribing locally as appropriate.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local UI status text changed; no provider calls, audio, Prompt Pack text, transcripts, screenshots, credentials, or target content handling changed.

description: Reject empty realtime cloud history entries

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation finalization should not save a blank history entry when OpenAI returns no usable transcript turns.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudHistoryService now composes provider turns before applying corrections and throws a clear error if the composed text is empty, preventing empty realtime entries from being persisted.
asi.privacy_boundary: The check uses only in-memory transcript turn text already needed for final insertion/history; it adds no logging, provider calls, audio storage, screenshots, credentials, Prompt Pack text, or target content.

description: Surface realtime finalization failures in overlay

asi.hypothesis: If realtime history/finalization fails after the session is stopped, the overlay should show a concise failure state instead of only propagating the renderer error.
asi.learned: transcription:realtime-finalize now wraps RealtimeCloudHistoryService.save, updates the overlay with a Cloud Dictation finalizing failure message on error, and rethrows for renderer cleanup/error handling.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only friendly local error text is surfaced; no raw provider responses, transcript text, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, credentials, or target content are logged or exposed.

description: Validate realtime PCM append chunks

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation IPC should reject malformed audio append payloads before they reach the OpenAI realtime provider.
asi.learned: transcription:realtime-append-pcm16 now requires a non-empty Uint8Array and rejects odd byte counts so PCM16 chunks always contain whole 16-bit samples before forwarding to the active session.
asi.privacy_boundary: This is local input validation only; it prevents malformed audio forwarding and does not log or expose audio, transcripts, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, credentials, or target content.

description: Track realtime readiness sub-gates

asi.hypothesis: OpenAI release gating should expose why realtime is still not release-ready now that IPC and renderer lifecycle are implemented but native PCM streaming remains incomplete.
asi.learned: OpenAiModeImplementationReadiness now tracks realtimeSessionIpcReady, realtimeRendererLifecycleReady, and realtimeNativePcmStreamingReady separately. Current readiness marks IPC and renderer lifecycle ready while keeping native PCM streaming and overall realtime release readiness false.
asi.privacy_boundary: Readiness metadata only; Cloud Dictation remains release-gated and no cloud payload, credential, audio, transcript, Prompt Pack, screenshot, or target content handling changed.

description: Show realtime readiness sub-gates in settings

asi.hypothesis: Developer/release settings should display the realtime readiness sub-gates so users/testers understand why Cloud Dictation remains release-gated despite partial realtime wiring.
asi.learned: Settings now shows a realtime readiness note with IPC, renderer lifecycle, and native PCM streaming ready/pending states from currentOpenAiModeImplementationReadiness.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only capability metadata is displayed; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, transcripts, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, or target content are exposed.

description: Explain realtime mode implementation blocker

asi.hypothesis: Mode availability should report the concrete realtime implementation blocker, not a generic not-implemented message, now that realtime has multiple readiness sub-gates.
asi.learned: Added getOpenAiModeImplementationStatus to map realtime readiness sub-gates to a user-facing implementation reason. Dictation mode availability now uses that status and reports that native PCM streaming is not implemented yet for realtime.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local capability metadata/copy changed; Cloud Dictation remains gated and no cloud data, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content flow changed.

description: Derive realtime release readiness from sub-gates

asi.hypothesis: Realtime release readiness should be derived from its implementation sub-gates so the release gate cannot drift from IPC, renderer lifecycle, and native PCM streaming status.
asi.learned: Added createOpenAiModeImplementationReadiness, which computes realtimeReady from realtimeSessionIpcReady, realtimeRendererLifecycleReady, and realtimeNativePcmStreamingReady. Current readiness now uses the helper, keeping realtime release readiness false until all sub-gates are true.
asi.privacy_boundary: Readiness metadata only; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content handling changed.

description: Emit realtime PCM16 chunks from native helper

asi.hypothesis: The native Windows helper should emit provider-ready 24 kHz mono PCM16 chunks during recording so the Electron realtime path can forward live audio to OpenAI without waiting for the completed WAV.
asi.learned: Added base64 dependency and realtimePcm16Chunk JSON events in the helper. Resampled 24 kHz mono float chunks are converted to little-endian PCM16, base64-encoded, and emitted on stdout alongside level events before VAD trimming/history saving.
asi.privacy_boundary: This emits live microphone audio only on the already-started local helper stdout path; it does not store realtime audio, log provider responses, or include screenshots, transcript history, full dictionary, target contents, Prompt Pack text, or credentials.

description: Forward native realtime PCM chunks to OpenAI session

asi.hypothesis: Now that the native helper emits realtimePcm16Chunk events, the main helper service should parse and forward those PCM16 chunks to the active realtime OpenAI session, completing native PCM streaming readiness.
asi.learned: WindowsHelperService now parses realtimePcm16Chunk JSON events, validates pcm16/24kHz/mono metadata, decodes base64 audio to Uint8Array chunks, and passes them through the recording callback. OpenAI readiness now marks realtimeNativePcmStreamingReady true, which derives realtimeReady true.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only live microphone PCM chunks from an active recording are forwarded to an already-gated realtime session; chunks are not saved or logged and no screenshots, transcript history, full dictionary, target contents, Prompt Pack text, or credentials are exposed.

description: Keep cloud release gated pending smoke testing

asi.hypothesis: Even after wiring native PCM streaming, normal release UI should stay gated until end-to-end Cloud Dictation has been smoke-tested, avoiding premature exposure of newly wired realtime behavior.
asi.learned: Added releaseSmokeTested as a final OpenAI readiness gate. RealtimeReady and all-modes release readiness now require it, and realtime availability reports a concrete smoke-testing blocker while developer preview remains available in developer builds.
asi.privacy_boundary: Readiness metadata only; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content handling changed.

description: Show release smoke-test readiness in settings

asi.hypothesis: Since release smoke testing is now the remaining cloud release gate, Settings should show that sub-gate alongside realtime implementation readiness.
asi.learned: The realtime readiness note now includes release smoke test ready/pending status, making it clear why release Cloud Dictation remains gated after IPC, renderer lifecycle, and native PCM streaming are ready.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only capability metadata is displayed; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content are exposed.

description: Define cloud release smoke-test checklist

asi.hypothesis: The release smoke-test gate should be backed by an explicit checklist, not a bare boolean, so future release enablement is reviewable and hard to accidentally flip.
asi.learned: Added shared CloudReleaseSmokeTestChecklist with required smoke-test items for realtime, file modes, Offline Mode kill switch, profile fallback, and sensitive-log checks. releaseSmokeTested is now derived from isCloudReleaseSmokeTestComplete(currentCloudReleaseSmokeTestChecklist).
asi.privacy_boundary: Checklist metadata only; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content handling changed.

description: Display pending cloud smoke-test items

asi.hypothesis: The release smoke-test gate should show which checklist items remain pending, not just that the gate is pending, so release readiness is actionable.
asi.learned: Added getPendingCloudReleaseSmokeTests and formatCloudReleaseSmokeTestStatus. Settings now displays the pending smoke-test checklist item keys alongside realtime readiness status.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local readiness/checklist metadata is displayed; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content are exposed.

description: Use readable cloud smoke-test labels

asi.hypothesis: Pending release smoke-test status should use reviewer-readable labels rather than internal checklist keys so the remaining gate is understandable in Settings.
asi.learned: Added cloudReleaseSmokeTestLabels and changed formatCloudReleaseSmokeTestStatus to map pending checklist keys to human-readable labels such as Realtime end-to-end dictation and No sensitive cloud logs.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only local checklist display text changed; no cloud payloads, credentials, audio, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, transcripts, or target content are exposed.

description: Assert realtime cloud lifecycle logs are metadata-only

asi.hypothesis: Realtime Cloud Dictation should use the same metadata-only log guard as file cloud dictation for started, completed, and cancelled lifecycle events.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession now creates and asserts metadata-only CloudDictationLogEntry objects at start, finalize completion, and cancel paths, including cancelled status, without persisting sensitive fields.
asi.privacy_boundary: Only provider/model/mode/status/duration metadata is checked; no audio, transcript text, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, credentials, provider responses, or target content is logged.

description: Cache realtime dictation mode in session

asi.hypothesis: RealtimeCloudSession should resolve its dictation mode once and reuse it for provider start and lifecycle metadata, avoiding repeated lookups and preventing model/mode drift inside a session.
asi.learned: RealtimeCloudSession now stores a readonly DictationMode resolved at construction and uses this.mode for startStreaming plus started/completed/cancelled metadata-only log entries.
asi.privacy_boundary: No cloud payload behavior changed; lifecycle metadata still contains only provider/model/mode/status/duration and no audio, transcripts, Prompt Pack text, screenshots, credentials, provider responses, or target content.

description: Expand cloud log sensitive-field guard

asi.hypothesis: The metadata-only cloud log guard should reject a broader set of sensitive field names before future logging code can accidentally include credentials, raw audio, OCR/image data, or target content.
